author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Designing three-layer GPU memory safety system: 1) Memory reservation — claim VRAM budget upfront so other apps can't steal it. 2) OOM recovery — catch CUDA OOM, free cache, retry instead of crashing. 3) Memory pressure pause — detect when free VRAM drops below threshold, pause training, wait for memory to become available, resume. Also: periodic VRAM watchdog, safe checkpoint on OOM, and memory budget enforcement. This solves the 'Steam game kills your training run' problem.
